Title: User Registration Success
Test Steps:
1. Start the process
2. Register a new user with valid details
3. Verify if the user is registered successfully
Expected Result: The user should be registered successfully and directed to the homepage.

Title: User Registration Failure
Test Steps:
1. Start the process
2. Attempt to register a new user with invalid details
3. Verify if the user registration fails
Expected Result: The user registration should fail and an appropriate error message should be displayed.

Title: Navigate Through Menu
Test Steps:
1. Click on the menu
2. Select 'Homepage'
3. Select 'My Signals'
4. Select 'Settings'
5. Close the menu and open the schema
Expected Result: The user should navigate through the menu and reach the settings page.

Title: Invalid Menu Selection
Test Steps:
1. Click on the menu
2. Select an invalid menu option
3. Verify if the system handles the invalid selection appropriately
Expected Result: The system should handle the invalid selection and display an appropriate error message.

Title: Add Alert with Valid Data
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add Alert' in the menu
2. Click 'Add Category'
3. Open the category list
4. Add an alert with valid data
Expected Result: The alert should be added successfully.

Title: Add Alert with Invalid Data
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Add Alert' in the menu
2. Click 'Add Category'
3. Open the category list
4. Try to add an alert with invalid data
Expected Result: The system should prevent the addition of the alert and display an appropriate error message.

Title: View All Alerts
Test Steps:
1. Click 'View Alerts'
2. View all alerts
3. Select one alert
4. Get the selected alert
5. View the selected alert
Expected Result: The user should be able to view all alerts and select one to view its details.

Title: View Single Alert
Test Steps:
1. Click 'View Alerts'
2. View all alerts
3. Select one alert
4. Get the selected alert
5. View the selected alert
Expected Result: The user should be able to view the details of the selected alert.

Title: Correctly Filled Profile
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Profile' in the menu
2. Click on the blue house icon
3. Pass to the abitazioni screen
4. Verify if the fields are correctly filled
5. Save the profile
Expected Result: The profile should be saved successfully.
